question: In Romans, what does Paul say Abraham believed, and it was counted to him as what?

choices.A: He believed God, and it was counted to him as righteousness
choices.B: He believed Moses, and it was counted to him as perfection
choices.C: He believed angels, and it was counted to him as knowledge
choices.D: He believed himself, and it was counted to him as honor

teaching.title: Abraham’s faith and righteousness
teaching.body: Paul quotes the statement that Abraham believed God and it was counted to him as righteousness.
